title: Ubiquiti UACC-OM-MM-10G-D-20 (UF-MM-10G-20) - U Fiber, Multi-Mode Module, 10G, 20-Pack
category: Optical networks / SFP optical modules / SFP+
description: UF-MM-10G is multimode 10G SFP+ module with 2 LC connectors. Wave length is 850nm and it is suitable for distances up to 300m . Module is compatible with all Ubiquiti products which contain SFP+ ports. Package contains 20 pieces
specsSearch: Optics Format SFP+ For cable type Multi Mode Transmission speed 10 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 850 Distance [km] 0,3 Transfer type 2-fiber Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (2) LC General Compatibility Universal
